### Noble House Alliance Mercenaries

These Mercenaries are acquired as Delegations via the Alliance Campaign Shop purchases.

#### 0-1 Masked Killer (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the House Catallus Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Masked Killer | 6”/Infantry | \+2 | \+2 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Masked Killer is equipped with Standard Armour, a Laspistol, Photo Goggles, and your choice of either a Power Weapon or a Longlas. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Laspistol.** 12”, PISTOL  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN-HAND ONLY  
* **Longlas.** 48”, \+1 DICE, CRITICAL, RISKY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Photo Goggles.** The equipped model ignores the STEALTH Keyword when making ranged attacks. In addition, the range of its weapons cannot be reduced.

**Abilities**

* **Artistry of Murder.** The Masked Killer adds \+1 INJURY MODIFIER to all attacks that it makes.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, STEALTH, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Mindfrayed (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the House Catallus Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Mindfrayed | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+2 | \-1 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Mindfrayed is equipped with Standard Armour, a Flail, a Close Combat Weapon, and a Displacer Field. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Flail.** Melee, \+1 DICE, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee  
* **Displacer Field.** All attacks against the equipped model have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Abilities**

* **Berserker.** The Mindfrayed rolls 2D6 instead of 1D6 to determine Charge distance, taking the highest result, and it can make an additional attack with one weapon when it takes the Fight Action during an Activation in which it Charged.  
* **Infectious Terror.** While the Mindflayed is within 8” of an enemy with the FEAR Keyword, each enemy within 8” of the Mindflayed has \-1 DICE to Hit with all attacks unless they have FEAR or NEGATE FEAR, and your opponent has \-1 DICE to all Morale Tests.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-1 Krieg Mester (Cost: 4 Glory)

Available via the House Greim Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Krieg Mester | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Krieg Mester is equipped with Power Armour, a Bolt Pistol, and a Power Weapon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bolt Pistol.** 12”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, PISTOL  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN-HAND ONLY

**Abilities**

* **An Eye For War.** Once during each battle, at the start of a Turn, while the Krieg Mester is on the battlefield and not Down, you can choose to gain the Initiative. If your opponent also uses this or a similar ability, normal Initiative applies instead.  
* **Overseer.** As an Action with no Success Roll, the Krieg Mester can designate one ally within 12” that it can see. The Krieg Mester’s Activation immediately ends and that model’s Activation begins.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Jagerkin (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the House Greim Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Jagerkin  | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | \-1 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Jagerkin is equipped with Standard Armour and an Automatic Shotgun. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Automatic Shotgun.** 12”, \+1 DICE, ASSAULT, SHOTGUN, TWO-HANDED

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Jagerkin is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Jagerkin instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Jagerkin.  
* **Point Blank Shot.** While in melee, the Jagerkin may make a Fight Action with a weapon with the SHOTGUN Keyword instead of making any normal Fight Actions. This attack uses the Jagerkin’s Ranged Skill. It can still use its Ranged Attack normally outside of Melee.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-1 Prima Materis (Cost: 4 Glory)

Available via the House Ko’Iron Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Prima Materis | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Prima Materis is equipped with Power Armour, a Bolt Pistol, a Shock Stave, and a Refractor Field. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Bolt Pistol.** 12”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, PISTOL  
* **Shock Stave.** Melee, BLOCK, STUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Refractor Field.** The equipped model treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).

**Abilities**

* **The Emperor Protects.** The first \-1 of armour of the Prima Materis and any friendly model within 6” of it has IMPERVIOUS, and \-DICE can always be applied to Injury rolls against it even if another rule would prevent this.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, LEADER, TOUGH

#### 0-2 Frateris Bodyguard (Cost: 2 Glory)

Available via the House Ko’Iron Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Frateris Bodyguard | 6”/Infantry | \+0 | \+0 | \-1 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Frateris Bodyguard is equipped with Standard Armour, a Laspistol, and a Chain Glaive. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Laspistol.** 12”, PISTOL  
* **Chain Glaive.** Melee, BLOCK, CRITICAL, RISKY, SHRAPNEL, TWO-HANDED, VICIOUS 11

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Frateris Bodyguard is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Frateris Bodyguard instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Frateris Bodyguard.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-1 Auditor (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the House Ran Lo Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Krieg Mester | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Krieg Mester is equipped with Standard Armour, a Web Pistol, and a Close Combat Weapon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Web Pistol.** 12”, IGNORE ARMOUR, \+2 INJURY DICE, PISTOL, STUN MARKERS, NONLETHAL, ASSAULT, STUN  
* **Close Combat Weapon.** Melee

**Abilities**

* **Audit.** As an Action with a Success Roll, the Auditor can give a STUN MARKER to one enemy it can see within 12” of it.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FEAR, GANGER, TOUGH

#### 0-1 Gelt-Scrivener (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the House Ran Lo Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Gelt-Scrivener | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | \-1 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Gelt-Scrivener is equipped with Standard Armour, a Longlas, a Bolt Pistol, and a Power Weapon (ignoring hand limits). You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Longlas.** 48”, \+1 DICE, CRITICAL, RISKY, TWO-HANDED  
* **Bolt Pistol.** 12”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, PISTOL  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY

**Abilities**

* **Bodyguard.** If any ally within 1” of the Gelt-Scrivener is hit by a ranged or melee weapon (excluding BLAST weapons), you can choose to redirect the hit to the Gelt-Scrivener instead. Determine the injuries exactly as if the weapon just hit the Gelt-Scrivener.  
* **Trick Shot.** The Gelt-Scrivener’s ranged attacks have IGNORE COVER.

**Keywords**  
GANGER

#### 0-1 Onmyodo Telepath (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the House Ty Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Onmyodo Telepath | 6”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Onmyodo Telepath is equipped with a Shock Stave and a Refractor Shield. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Shock Stave.** Melee, BLOCK, STUN, TWO-HANDED  
* **Refractor Field.** The Pyrocean Lord treats Down results as Minor Hits (does not affect Down results that replace Out of Action via TOUGH Keyword).

The Onmyodo Telepath knows the following psychic powers:

1. **Invisibility (Effect).** No Range, Self, Special, if any piece of scenery the caster is touching can block line of sight in any direction, even partially, regardless of whether an enemy currently has a clear line of sight, then enemies cannot target the caster with ranged attacks or Charges. Weapons with the Keyword BLAST affect it as normal if it is in the radius of the weapon. This effect ends if this caster moves from its exact position in any way, it makes a Ranged Attack, or an enemy model comes within 1.5” of it.  
2. **Psychic Shriek (Attack).** Melee, IGNORE ARMOUR, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
3. **Puppet Master (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D6” in the direction of your choice. This movement allows free attacks as if it were a Retreat Action. This power cannot be used while in close combat.  
4. **Terrify (Effect).** Melee, One Enemy, Immediate, the target must move D6” directly away from the caster. This movement can bring the target into or out of melee, and counts as a Charge and/or Retreat as appropriate. A model that ignores the FEAR Keyword is immune.

**Abilities**

* **Onmyoto Coven.** The Onmyoto Telepath forms a Fireteam with an Onmyoto Null, if both are fielded.  
* **Telepath Control Collar.** When the Onmyodo Telepath uses its first psychic power during each of its Activations, you can choose whether it has PSYKER 1, or PSYKER 2 and PERILOUS ±2 with all powers, until you make this choice again.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, FIRETEAM, GANGER, LEADER, PSYKER 1 or 2

#### 0-1 Onmyodo Null (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the House Ty Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Onmyodo Null | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Onmyodo Null is equipped with Standard Armour, a Boltgun, a Power Weapon, and FIlter Plugs. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Boltgun.** 24”, VICIOUS 11, CRITICAL, TWO-HANDED  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Filter Plugs.** The model has NEGATE GAS.

**Abilities**

* **Onmyoto Coven.** The Onmyoto Null forms a Fireteam with an Onmyoto Telepath, if both are fielded.  
* **Psychic Null.** The Onmyodod Null cannot be targeted or affected by enemy PSYCHIC weapons or abilities, and enemy PSYCHIC Success Rolls cannot be used while within 6” of it.  
* **Null Control Collar.** At the start of the Onmyodo Null’s Activation, you can choose to cause its Psychic Null Ability to have no effect until its next Activation.

**Keywords**  
ANATHEMA, ELITE, FEAR, FIRETEAM, GANGER

#### 0-1 Courtier (Cost: 3 Glory)

Available via the House Ulanti Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Courtier | 7”/Infantry | \+1 | \+2 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Courtier is equipped with a Needle Pistol, a Power Weapon, and a Displacer Field. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Needle Pistol.** 12”, GAS, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Displacer Field.** All attacks against the equipped model have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Abilities**

* **Duelist.** Whenever an enemy Charges the Courtier, the Courtier can make a single melee attack with a non-HEAVY weapon against that enemy before it takes any further actions.  
* **Mirror Dance.** The first time the Courtier would be taken Out of Action during each battle, if your Mirror Mask is on the battlefield as has not yet used its TOUGH Keyword, you can swap the location of the Courtier and Mirror Mask, and cause the Mirror Mask to suffer the Out of Action result instead, which then uses its TOUGH Keyword as normal.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, GANGER, SKIRMISHER

#### 0-1 Mirror Mask (Cost: 4 Glory)

Available via the House Ulanti Alliance.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Mirror Mask | 7”/Infantry | \+1 | \+2 | 0 | 25-32mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Mirror Mask is equipped with a Needle Pistol, a Power Weapon, and a Displacer Field. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Needle Pistol.** 12”, GAS, ASSAULT, PISTOL  
* **Power Weapon.** Melee, ARMOUR PIERCING 2, MAIN HAND ONLY  
* **Displacer Field.** All attacks against the equipped model have \-1 DICE to Hit.

**Abilities**

* **Many Faces.** At the start of the Mirror Mask’s Activation, you can swap its location with your Courtier if it is on the battlefield. This does not count as movement, and has no other effect on their conditions.  
* **Mirror Entity.** The Mirror Mask never makes a Casualty roll, but it is also removed if your Courtier is ever removed from your Warband.

**Keywords**  
ARTIFICIAL, GANGER, NEGATE FEAR, NO PROMOTION, TOUGH
